payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown stained wood cabinet side with recessed rectangular panels and a lighter unfinished plywood top edge visible at the top; the surface shows scuffs and a semi-gloss finish, edge-cropped in the frame and photographed from roughly 0.8 meters away.
